class_description: Rotator — ordered disk-like rotation confirmed by 3DBarolo and W15 criteria

e_Vrot_kms.description: Uncertainty on Vrot (fit uncertainty; excludes inclination systematics)

Mdyn_msun.description: Dynamical mass = Vrot^2 * R / G (circular rotation assumed)

quality_notes: Quality tier 1: 3DBarolo tilted-ring fit with per-ring Vrot/sigma/Mdyn. Confirmed rotator from Jones et al. 2021 Table C1. ALMA [CII] 158um; spatial resolution ~1 arcsec (~6-7 kpc). Inclination uncertainty not propagated into Vrot errors.
known_issues: Only 2 ring(s): marginally resolved. Rotation curve shape poorly constrained. Beam smearing not fully corrected at this resolution.

Beam smearing: ALPINE spatial resolution ~1 arcsec ~ 6-7 kpc at z~4.5-5.9. Only 2-3 rings per model; large-scale kinematics poorly constrained. 3DBarolo mitigates but does not eliminate beam-smearing effects.
reference: Jones et al. (2021), MNRAS; Le Fèvre et al. (2020), A&A 643, A1
citation: Jones, G.C. et al. 2021, MNRAS, "ALPINE-ALMA [CII] Survey: Kinematic Diversity & Rotation at z~4.4-5.9", arXiv:2104.03099; Le Fèvre, O. et al. 2020, A&A 643, A1; Béthermin, M. et al. 2020, A&A 643, A2; Faisst, A.L. et al. 2020, ApJS 247, 61

known_issues: No per-ring rotation curve: galaxy is classified as UNC. Data array is empty. Kinematic state characterised by classification only.

Beam smearing: ALPINE spatial resolution ~1 arcsec ~ 6-7 kpc at z~4.5-5.9. Only 2-3 rings per model; large-scale kinematics poorly constrained. 3DBarolo mitigates but does not eliminate beam-smearing effects.
reference: Jones et al. (2021), MNRAS; Le Fèvre et al. (2020), A&A 643, A1
citation: Jones, G.C. et al. 2021, MNRAS, "ALPINE-ALMA [CII] Survey: Kinematic Diversity & Rotation at z~4.4-5.9", arXiv:2104.03099; Le Fèvre, O. et al. 2020, A&A 643, A1; Béthermin, M. et al. 2020, A&A 643, A2; Faisst, A.L. et al. 2020, ApJS 247, 61

class_description: Rotator — ordered disk-like rotation confirmed by 3DBarolo and W15 criteria

e_Vrot_kms.description: Uncertainty on Vrot (fit uncertainty; excludes inclination systematics)

Mdyn_msun.description: Dynamical mass = Vrot^2 * R / G (circular rotation assumed)

quality_notes: Quality tier 1: 3DBarolo tilted-ring fit with per-ring Vrot/sigma/Mdyn. Confirmed rotator from Jones et al. 2021 Table C1. ALMA [CII] 158um; spatial resolution ~1 arcsec (~6-7 kpc). Inclination uncertainty not propagated into Vrot errors.
known_issues: Only 2 ring(s): marginally resolved. Rotation curve shape poorly constrained. Beam smearing not fully corrected at this resolution.

Beam smearing: ALPINE spatial resolution ~1 arcsec ~ 6-7 kpc at z~4.5-5.9. Only 2-3 rings per model; large-scale kinematics poorly constrained. 3DBarolo mitigates but does not eliminate beam-smearing effects.
